text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I get it... These other racers sure aren't
anything to sniff at.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
None of my tricks got a bite. My preparations
were clearly not enough...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'll have to reflect on this a little.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. But I think I'm gonna need more than
just a strategy if I'm gonna win...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okey dokey, once I'm home I'm gonna look back
real hard on what happened today, and then
plunge into some rigorous training!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Is that what you thought I'd say? There's no way
I'd ever seriously spit that out!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm not giving up on my tactics. Strategies are
how I win. That's my style, y'know.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
My style's had quite an impact on you, right,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
To win, I need more than just natural-born
aptitude.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So I use strategy to make up for where I'm
lacking. That's how I win.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nya-ha-ha! Did I push a button?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're not wrong though. With your help, the
scope of my plans can only get bigger!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Next time, we'll have them in the palms of our
hands! Heh-heh-heh...
